details.reasoning: Excellent implementation. ImageTextToTextPipeline class is correctly implemented with async _call method accepting images and text prompt. Properly imports and uses AutoModelForImageTextToText, handles pixel_values for image processing via processor, calls model.generate(), returns generated_text in correct format, and is registered in SUPPORTED_TASKS with 'multimodal' type. Comprehensive JSDoc documentation with @typedef types and usage example. Follows existing pipeline patterns (class extension, batch processing, prepareImages utility). No existing code modified. Minor: empty PLAN.md file created unnecessarily, but doesn't affect functionality. Implementation is production-ready.
